'''dahobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachina|kachina]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachina|kachina]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dahobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhebeth|dæhebeth]] || [[word:dæhebej|dæhebej]] || [[word:dæhebesh|dæhebesh]] || [[word:dæhebe|dæhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahohoboth|dahohoboth]] || [[word:dahohoboj|dahohoboj]] || [[word:dahohobosh|dahohobosh]] || [[word:dahohobo|dahohobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahoboth|dahoboth]] || [[word:dahoboj|dahoboj]] || [[word:dahobosh|dahobosh]] || [[word:dahobo|dahobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahofboth|dahofboth]] || [[word:dahofboj|dahofboj]] || [[word:dahofbosh|dahofbosh]] || [[word:dahofbof|dahofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahobotho|dahobotho]] || [[word:dahobojo|dahobojo]] || [[word:dahobosho|dahobosho]] || [[word:dahoboko|dahoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahoboth|dahoboth]] || [[word:dahoboj|dahoboj]] || [[word:dahobosh|dahobosh]] || [[word:dahobo|dahobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahobothol|dahobothol]] || [[word:dahobojol|dahobojol]] || [[word:dahoboshol|dahoboshol]] || [[word:dahobokol|dahobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahobothotho|dahobothotho]] || [[word:dahobojojo|dahobojojo]] || [[word:dahoboshosho|dahoboshosho]] || [[word:dahoboko|dahoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahobothon|dahobothon]] || [[word:dahobojon|dahobojon]] || [[word:dahoboshon|dahoboshon]] || [[word:dahobokon|dahobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahobothoro|dahobothoro]] || [[word:dahobojoro|dahobojoro]] || [[word:dahoboshoro|dahoboshoro]] || [[word:dahobokoro|dahobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
